videos.title: I think some of us can lose the plot at times when it comes to sharin...
videos.description: I think some of us can lose the plot at times when it comes to sharing film recommendations with friends, family, and mutuals.  We should have them in mind when recommending, not ourselves. If the intention is to share something for them to enjoy, it shouldn’t be self-gratuitous. The reward is them saying they liked that a piece of art made us thank of them, not that we convinced them to sit through something that we enjoyed but wasn’t sure they would too.  #filmtok #movietok #moviesuggestions #filmsuggestions #movierecommendation #movierecommendations #movie #movies #films #letterboxd
